creator: lbolmerg@posteo.de
text:
After pkg upgrade of dokuwiki from 20170219e to 20180422 I get the following error:

Fatal error: Call to undefined function json_encode() in /usr/local/www/dokuwiki/inc/template.php on line 343

# uname -a 
FreeBSD ludger-thinkpad.fritz.box 11.1-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p9 #0: Tue Apr  3 16:59:16 UTC 2018     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
